title: onobrychis microptera
intro: Onobrychis microptera, also known as the small-flowered bird's foot trefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is primarily found in mountainous regions of Central Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Onobrychis microptera can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
